releaseName: Pleiades Restored VIN and Special-Identifier Register

modules.name: Vehicle Intelligence Hub
modules.notes: Shared entry point for progressive VIN analysis, exact factory VINs, surrogate VINs, chassis numbers, 90 Australian makes, specifications and connected technical resources.

modules.name: VIN / EPC Reference Finder
modules.notes: Dedicated progressive finder for public Australian VINs, confirmed imported factory VINs, Australian and New Zealand surrogate VINs and Japanese chassis numbers. Search by year, model, edition, production number, powertrain, model code, partial identifier or full identifier.

modules.name: Subaru Special-Identifier Register
modules.notes: Restores 14 previously supplied Subaru factory VINs and 22 surrogate/chassis identifiers covering Forester, Blitzen, RB320, P1, CS400, Peter Solberg Edition, GB270, Vortex, S201-S206, S401, 22B and Tommy Kaira research records.

modules.name: Australian Make Directory
modules.notes: Current, legacy and major commercial makes are searchable by name, alias and selected WMI routes. Missing WMI evidence remains manual-research rather than guessed.

modules.name: VIN Structure Analysis
modules.notes: Local region, WMI, descriptor, repeating year-code candidates, plant, serial and check-digit analysis with non-North-American caveats.

modules.name: Confirmed Identifier Register
modules.notes: Reviewed factory VINs, Australian 6ZZ surrogate VIN mappings, New Zealand 7AT candidates and Japanese chassis numbers are searchable without inferring unverified powertrain or parts-fitment details.

modules.name: External VIN Research
modules.notes: User-initiated in-page official vPIC decoding plus links to Australian Vehicle Recalls and exact Australian web research. VINs are not sent automatically.

modules.name: Honda VIN Decoder
modules.notes: Confirmed Australian-market Civic VIN fingerprints with manual fallback and no-guess behaviour.

modules.name: Honda Accessory Database
modules.notes: Website-hosted JSON data with importer and rebuild workflow; legacy Excel pages retained as archive sources.

modules.name: Vehicle Specifications
modules.notes: Engine, power, torque, transmission and drivetrain supported; exact kerb weight, kW/tonne and 0-100 remain unavailable where not verified.

modules.name: Fluids Compatibility
modules.notes: Existing structured cross-brand fluids hub retained.

modules.name: Brand Portals
modules.notes: Existing specialist portals remain available while their content is converted into structured records.

modules.name: Australian VIN Research
modules.notes: Australian Government recall evidence and official manufacturer/WMI evidence are kept separate; uncertain model and configuration records remain manual-review.

modules.name: Inventory & Ordering
modules.notes: Permission-gated and not merged into Vehicle Intelligence.
